home-loads.name: Landing page loads
home-loads.description: Versiona landing renders with the 'El Git de tus documentos' headline

auth-sign-in-form.name: Sign-in form display and interaction
auth-sign-in-form.description: Sign-in page renders email/password fields and links to recovery

auth-sign-up-form.name: Sign-up form display and validation
auth-sign-up-form.description: Sign-up page renders and validates password confirmation

auth-login-invalid.name: Invalid credentials are rejected
auth-login-invalid.description: Wrong credentials show an error and do not create a session

auth-protected-redirect.name: Protected routes redirect anonymous users
auth-protected-redirect.description: Visiting a protected route without a session redirects to sign-in

auth-forgot-password-form.name: Password recovery form
auth-forgot-password-form.description: Recovery page renders the two-step code + reset form

auth-sign-in-success.name: Sign-in happy path with a real session
auth-sign-in-success.description: Valid credentials create a real session (cookies set) and land on /dashboard; header shows Panel/Salir
auth-sign-in-success.knownGaps: Closed in It1 by the storageState harness + session spec

auth-sign-out.name: Sign out ends the session
auth-sign-out.description: Authenticated user presses Salir; cookies are cleared and protected routes redirect again
auth-sign-out.knownGaps: Closed in It1 by the session spec

auth-admin-login-handoff.name: Django admin impersonation handoff
auth-admin-login-handoff.description: /admin-login consumes access/refresh/redirect query params, stores tokens and redirects
auth-admin-login-handoff.knownGaps: Unit-tested only; E2E needs crafted tokens (low priority)

help-manual-browse.name: Browse the interactive help
help-manual-browse.description: /manual renders Versiona help sections and fuzzy search finds a process

a1-onboarding-wow.name: A1 - Sign-up and first wow moment
a1-onboarding-wow.description: New user signs up, names their org, the sample project seeds, and they see a working comparison in under 5 minutes without uploading anything (docs/plan/01 A1)

a2-invite-team.name: A2 - Invite the team and assign roles
a2-invite-team.description: Admin invites an email with a role; invitee accepts and lands directly on the project (docs/plan/01 A2)

b1-create-project.name: B1 - Create a project in 30 seconds
b1-create-project.description: Member creates a project with name only and lands on the empty project with the upload dropzone (docs/plan/01 B1)

b2-projects-board.name: B2 - Projects board with states, filters and search
b2-projects-board.description: Board shows derived states, filters by state and searches by name and content (docs/plan/01 B2)

b3-project-settings.name: B3 - Edit project configuration (never retroactive)
b3-project-settings.description: Admin edits checklist/section owners/approval rules creating a new config version (docs/plan/01 B3)

c1-upload-first.name: C1 - Upload the first document
c1-upload-first.description: Editor drags a PDF; analysis indexes sections and version 1 shows its traffic light (docs/plan/01 C1)

c2-upload-version.name: C2 - Upload a new version (the commit)
c2-upload-version.description: Editor uploads a re-delivery with a message; within seconds sees what changed, check deltas and affected seals (docs/plan/01 C2)

c3-history.name: C3 - Browse the version history
c3-history.description: Timeline shows author/date/message per version, downloads via signed URL and jumps to comparison (docs/plan/01 C3)

d1-request-review.name: D1 - Request a review (the pull request)
d1-request-review.description: Author opens a review request; reviewers are assigned from section owners and see it in their inbox (docs/plan/01 D1)

d2-assisted-review.name: D2 - Review with assistance (already reviewed by you)
d2-assisted-review.description: Reviewer sees traffic light and change summary first, jumps to changed sections, unchanged-since-my-seal sections are marked (docs/plan/01 D2)

d3-anchored-observations.name: D3 - Anchored observations with state
d3-anchored-observations.description: Reviewer selects a page zone and comments; thread transitions open/answered/resolved and survives across versions (docs/plan/01 D3)

d4-seal-approve.name: D4 - Approve with a seal
d4-seal-approve.description: Reviewer seals in one click; with all required seals the version freezes as approved (docs/plan/01 D4)

d5-selective-invalidation.name: D5 - Re-delivery and selective invalidation (the jewel)
d5-selective-invalidation.description: New version invalidates only seals over changed sections, preserves the rest with validity records, and notifies only affected reviewers (docs/plan/01 D5; queen test docs/plan/06 SS5.4)

e1-compare.name: E1 - Compare any two versions (star screen)
e1-compare.description: Side-by-side with highlights, modified-section list matching the fixture truth table, and summary view (docs/plan/01 E1)

e3-configurable-checks.name: E3 - Configure and run checks (traffic light with evidence)
e3-configurable-checks.description: Admin adds a check; next version runs it and shows evidence navigable to the page (docs/plan/01 E3)

f1-billing.name: F1 - Choose a plan and pay
f1-billing.description: Free org hits a plan limit, upgrades self-service via Wompi test mode, and sees the invoice listed (docs/plan/01 F1)

c4-delete-draft.name: C4 - Delete a draft version (trash + restore)
c4-delete-draft.description: Latest draft version goes to the trash with two-step confirmation, shows a tombstone and can be restored (docs/audit/03 C4)

a3-account-security.name: A3 - 2FA and active sessions
a3-account-security.description: TOTP enrolment, challenge on login and session revocation (docs/audit/03 A3)

e2-saved-comparisons.name: E2 - Saved comparisons
e2-saved-comparisons.description: Save a comparison with a name, list it per project, share an internal link (docs/audit/03 E2)

f2-usage-panel.name: F2 - Usage panel and preventive warnings
f2-usage-panel.description: Usage vs plan limits with warnings at 80% (docs/audit/03 F2)

e4-constancia.name: E4 - Exportable certificate
e4-constancia.description: Issue and download the validity certificate PDF of an approved version (docs/audit/03 E4)

master-e2e-journey.name: M1 - Master end-to-end journey
master-e2e-journey.description: Sign-up to certificate export in 16 UI-only steps (docs/audit/03 SS7)
